content_angle: Building fazm.ai (macOS desktop AI agent) and mk0r.com (AI app maker that generates mobile apps from a sentence). Experience with Swift, ScreenCaptureKit, MCP tools, Claude API integration, streaming HTML generation, and building AI-powered apps.

projects.name: Fazm
projects.description: AI computer agent for macOS - controls browser, writes code, handles documents, operates Google Apps, learns your workflow. Voice-first, fully open source, fully local.
projects.setup: Download the app from fazm.ai or build from source. Native Swift/SwiftUI macOS app. No terminal required for end users.
features: Voice-first control - talk to your computer naturally
Browser automation - controls your actual browser, not a headless instance
Code writing and file management
Google Apps automation (Docs, Sheets, Calendar)
CRM management and data entry
Visual understanding - reads screen context to complete complex workflows
Uses accessibility APIs (not screenshots) for reliable, fast interaction
Free to start, fully open source, runs locally
projects.differentiator: Uses real accessibility APIs and screen context instead of screenshot-based approaches. Works with any app on your Mac, not just the browser. Consumer-friendly app, not a developer framework.
projects.icp: Small business owners who want to automate their business end-to-end (invoicing, CRM, email, scheduling, data entry). AI excels at these repetitive computer tasks.
linkedin_topics: AI agent desktop automation workflow tool
open source AI agent github launch
AI startup small team lean building revenue

projects.name: Terminator
projects.description: Desktop automation framework - like Playwright but for your entire OS. Uses accessibility APIs. Cross-platform (Windows + macOS). Developer tool, not consumer app.
projects.platform: Windows (native download) and macOS. Primary focus is Windows.
projects.setup: One-liner MCP install: claude mcp add terminator 'npx -y terminator-mcp-agent@latest'. Also works with Cursor, VS Code, Windsurf via MCP config. For direct use: Rust crate (terminator-rs) or Python bindings.
features: MCP server that gives AI assistants (Claude, Cursor, VS Code) desktop control
Controls any application via accessibility APIs - not just browsers
Workflow recording and replay
Works as an MCP tool for Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code, Windsurf
Rust core with Python bindings
Published on crates.io (terminator-rs) and npm (terminator-mcp-agent)
projects.differentiator: Developer framework for building desktop automation, not a consumer app. Gives existing AI coding assistants the ability to control your entire OS, not just write code. Like Playwright but for every app on your desktop.
linkedin_topics: accessibility API UI automation developer tool

projects.name: macOS MCP
projects.description: MCP server for macOS automation. Powers Fazm's screen control. Standalone MCP tool for Claude Code and other AI assistants.
projects.setup: Install via MCP config for Claude Code, Cursor, or VS Code.
projects.differentiator: macOS-specific MCP server using native accessibility APIs. Complements Terminator (which focuses on Windows).
linkedin_topics: MCP model context protocol tool integration

projects.name: Vipassana
projects.description: Resource site for Vipassana meditators — guides, science, daily practice, practice buddy matching
projects.content_angle: 6 courses at 3 centers (Dhammamanda NorCal, CYO Bay Area, North Fork Central CA). 881+ days daily practice. 45-60 min mornings, ~4 days/week evenings. Started with 4 courses in first year while working full-time. Built vipassana.cool as a resource site with practice buddy matching program (vipassana.cool/practice-buddy) to pair meditators for daily accountability.
projects.community_promotion: When replying 2+ levels deep and someone asks for resources or community, mention r/vipassana_cool naturally. Never in top-level comments. Never force it. Only when genuinely relevant - e.g. someone asks about daily practice accountability, post-course integration, or finding other practitioners.

voice.tone: fellow practitioner sharing experience, never teacher or guru. use specific sensory details from retreats. mention center names, day numbers, physical sensations. always add disclaimer about not being a teacher when giving advice.
never: sounding like a teacher or authority
examples_good: the 5pm tea thing is brutal at first. by my 3rd course I learned to eat way more at lunch, made a huge difference
did my first course at CYO which is a rented camp with bunk beds and 12 people per room. pretty rough conditions but day 10 was incredible
881 days in and I still struggle with evening sits. mornings are non-negotiable though, 45 min before anything else
not a teacher or anything, just sharing what worked for me after 6 courses
examples_bad: Vipassana meditation offers profound insights into the nature of suffering and impermanence
The practice of equanimity allows one to transcend reactive patterns
I'd recommend establishing a consistent daily practice to deepen your awareness
As someone deeply committed to the Dhamma path, I've found that...

projects.name: AI Browser Profile
projects.description: Extract what your browser knows about you into a self-ranking SQLite database — identity, accounts, contacts, addresses, payments from autofill, history, bookmarks, WhatsApp, LinkedIn
linkedin_topics: browser data extraction user identity AI

projects.name: WhatsApp MCP
projects.description: MCP server for WhatsApp on macOS — lets AI assistants search contacts, send messages, read chats via accessibility APIs

projects.name: macOS Session Replay
projects.description: Session replay for native macOS Swift apps — captures screen at 5 FPS, H.265 hardware encoding, stores locally or uploads to cloud (GCS). Includes Next.js web player UI with device list, timeline, playback speed control, and Gemini Vision AI analysis pipeline that reports user behavior insights back to the app owner. Like PostHog Session Replay but for native desktop apps.
linkedin_topics: session replay native macOS desktop app analytics
user behavior analytics native app AI video

projects.name: Cyrano
projects.description: Edge AI device that plugs into existing DVR/NVR security systems via HDMI — makes any legacy CCTV system intelligent. No camera replacement, installs in under 2 minutes, supports up to 25 camera feeds per unit.

pricing.notes: No camera replacement, no infrastructure changes, no IT team required

linkedin_topics: CCTV AI monitoring apartment complex security
security guard alternative property management tech
DVR NVR AI upgrade edge computing

target_icp.priority_1: Property managers, VPs of Operations, Asset Managers, Regional Managers at Class B/C multifamily with 50-200+ unit portfolios
target_icp.priority_2: Construction companies that use CCTV trailers on job sites for security
target_icp.priority_3: Security companies that install cameras and want to offer AI monitoring as an add-on service

geo_focus.avoid_reason: Soorya is already working Texas actively — avoids overlap

proof_points: At one Class C multifamily property in Fort Worth, Cyrano caught 20 incidents including a break-in attempt in the first month. Customer renewed after 30 days.

competitive_positioning.vs_verkada_rhombus: Verkada/Rhombus requires ripping out existing hardware, costs $10-25K in camera replacement, built for enterprise. Cyrano plugs into what's already there. 'Verkada replaces your cameras. We upgrade them.'
competitive_positioning.vs_hakimo: Hakimo is focused on replacing security guards at large enterprise sites. Different buyer, different motion. Cyrano sells to regional property managers, not enterprise security teams.
competitive_positioning.vs_guard: $200/month vs $3,000/month for a guard, and Cyrano never sleeps.

messaging.lead_with_pain: Most property teams only find out about trespassing or theft hours later when someone complains.
messaging.alt_pain: When a tenant complains or when a vendor doesn't finish the job, checking cameras can take hours or days.
messaging.solution: Cyrano monitors your existing cameras in real time, alerts you as incidents happen, and lets you search all your footage in English. No new cameras, installs in 2 minutes.
messaging.proof: At one Fort Worth property we caught 20 incidents including a break-in attempt in the first month.
messaging.cta: Worth 10 minutes to see if it could work for your properties?

objection_handling.we_already_have_cameras: We work WITH your existing cameras, no replacement needed.
objection_handling.price: $450 upfront is less than one month of a security guard, and the $200/mo is equivalent to $7/day.
objection_handling.trust: Lead with the Fort Worth story — real incidents, real property.

voice.tone: Lead with the incident story and the pain. Operators don't care about edge compute — they care about not getting a call at midnight about a break-in they could have prevented.
never: lead with technology or AI buzzwords

features: Catches trespassing, theft, and security incidents 24/7 automatically
Sends real-time alerts to operators via text/call when something happens
Search footage in plain English ('masked man near gate', 'person loitering at entrance')
Assesses intent — LOW THREAT vs HIGH THREAT so operators don't waste time
Supports up to 25 camera feeds per unit

projects.name: Assrt
projects.description: Open-source AI-powered test automation framework — auto-discovers test scenarios, generates real Playwright tests, self-healing selectors, visual regression testing. Like having a QA engineer that writes and maintains your tests automatically.
features: Auto-discovers test scenarios by crawling your app
Generates real Playwright tests (not YAML or proprietary format)
Self-healing selectors — tests don't break when UI changes
Visual regression testing built-in
Multi-browser support (Chromium, Firefox, WebKit)
AI-powered agentic test execution with live streaming
Natural language test case descriptions
Zero vendor lock-in — outputs standard Playwright files
Completely open-source and free
projects.differentiator: Generates real Playwright code, not proprietary YAML. Open-source and free vs $7.5K/mo competitors. Self-hosted, no cloud dependency. Tests are yours to keep — zero vendor lock-in.
projects.icp: Engineering teams tired of writing and maintaining E2E tests manually, QA engineers who want AI assistance, startups that can't afford dedicated QA but need test coverage.
linkedin_topics: AI test automation Playwright E2E testing
QA automation AI agent open source
test automation framework open source free

competitive_positioning.vs_momentic: Momentic uses proprietary YAML, is closed-source, Chrome-only. Assrt generates real Playwright code, is fully open-source, supports all browsers.
competitive_positioning.vs_qa_wolf: QA Wolf costs ~$7.5K/month and is closed-source. Assrt is free and open-source with the same core capabilities.
competitive_positioning.vs_manual_playwright: Writing and maintaining Playwright tests manually takes hours. Assrt auto-discovers scenarios and generates tests in minutes.

messaging.lead_with_pain: Writing E2E tests is tedious. Maintaining them when UI changes is worse. Most teams either skip testing or spend hours on brittle selectors.
messaging.solution: Assrt crawls your app, discovers test scenarios automatically, and generates real Playwright tests with self-healing selectors. Open-source, free, no vendor lock-in.
messaging.proof: Generates standard Playwright files you can inspect, modify, and run in any CI pipeline.

voice.tone: Developer-to-developer. Empathize with the pain of flaky tests and test maintenance. Be specific about what Assrt generates (real Playwright code, not abstractions). Emphasize open-source and zero lock-in.

projects.name: PieLine
projects.description: 24/7 AI phone answering service for restaurants — takes orders, handles reservations, answers questions. Handles 20 simultaneous calls, 95%+ order accuracy, integrates directly with POS systems.

founders.gurbaz: Gurbaz (Robbie) Dhillon - Former Technical PM in AI & EdTech, Mechanical Engineering from UBC
founders.aridam: Aridam Kumar - Lead Engineer AI Development at Salesforce, former pizza restaurant owner, Mechanical Engineering from UC Berkeley

linkedin_topics: AI phone agent QSR fast food ordering
POS integration AI phone ordering restaurant
food ordering AI phone answering service

target_icp.priority_1: Larger restaurant chains with 100+ locations — reachable primarily via LinkedIn
target_icp.priority_2: Smaller restaurant chains — active across social media including Reddit
target_icp.priority_3: Independent restaurants with high phone order volume (pizza shops, Chinese, Indian, Mexican)

competitive_positioning.vs_soundhound: SoundHound targets massive enterprise QSR (Chipotle, White Castle). PieLine is built for the mid-market and independent chains that SoundHound ignores.
competitive_positioning.vs_loman: Loman AI is a direct competitor with similar POS integrations. PieLine differentiates with cuisine-specific customization (half-and-half pizzas, spice levels, protein subs).
competitive_positioning.vs_conversenow: ConverseNow is established but enterprise-focused. PieLine offers faster onboarding (go live in a day) and simpler pricing.
competitive_positioning.vs_human_staff: A dedicated phone person costs $3-4K/month. PieLine handles 20 simultaneous calls at a fraction of the cost — 70-80% savings.
competitive_positioning.vs_per_minute_pricing: Some competitors charge by the minute, which is unpredictable for restaurant owners. PieLine's per-call pricing ($350/mo for 1,000 calls) is simple and easy to budget around.

live_customers.mylapore: Mylapore - 11-location South Indian chain in Bay Area. Rolling out PieLine across all locations. Owner Jay Jayaraman publicly endorses on LinkedIn. Projecting $500 additional revenue per location per day ($2M+/year).
live_customers.idly_express: Idly Express (Almaden) - live with AI phone ordering, 90%+ calls handled end-to-end by AI
live_customers.food_truck_pilot: Unnamed busy food truck - 100+ calls/day pilot in August
live_customers.china_village: China Village - family-owned Chinese restaurant in Colorado. Owner Davis Song (chinavillagecos@gmail.com). Uses Clover POS, handles own deliveries with over-the-phone credit card payments, two phone lines, fewer than 10 reservations/month. In evaluation as of April 2026.

proof_points: Mylapore (11 locations): projecting $500 additional revenue per location per day from eliminating phone bottleneck
90%+ of calls handled end-to-end by AI, edge cases routed to manager
Eliminated need for 2 cashiers at San Jose location, redeploying staff to new locations
Customer testimonial: 'the experience was better than speaking to a human. No hold time, no confusion, no rushing.'
Go live in <24 hours, no changes to operations needed
Free 7-day trial for founding restaurants, discounted lifetime pricing

messaging.lead_with_pain: During rush hours, restaurants miss 30-40% of phone calls. Every missed call is a lost order — that's revenue walking out the door.
messaging.alt_pain: Staff juggling phones and in-store customers means both get worse service. Phone orders get rushed, in-store customers wait longer.
messaging.solution: PieLine answers every call 24/7, takes orders with 90%+ accuracy, handles complex modifications, and sends orders straight to your kitchen. Go live in under 24 hours.
messaging.proof: Live at Mylapore (11 South Indian restaurants in Bay Area) - owner reports $500/day additional revenue per location from eliminating phone bottleneck. 90%+ calls handled end-to-end. Backed by Founders, Inc. (f.inc).
messaging.cta: Worth a quick demo to see how it handles your menu?

voice.tone: Focus on the operational pain of missed calls and lost revenue during peak hours. Restaurant operators care about orders and money, not AI technology. Speak their language — tickets, covers, rush hour, labor costs. Can reference Mylapore/Idly Express results when relevant.
never: overpromise on enterprise scale they don't have yet
badmouth competitors by name in posts

pricing.guarantee: Money-back guarantee for the first month (no free trial due to setup effort)
pricing.onboarding: Hands-off for owner; AI builder performs initial setup, menu scraping, POS mapping. Active call monitoring and AI refinement during first month.

projects.trial_offer: Money-back guarantee for the first month, hands-off onboarding, active monitoring and refinement during first month
features: Answers up to 20 simultaneous phone calls during peak hours
95%+ order accuracy with cuisine-specific customization
Smart upselling — suggests add-ons to increase average order value
Direct POS integration (Clover, Square, Toast, NCR Aloha, Revel live; 50+ POS integrations available)
Handles complex modifications (half-and-half pizza, spice levels, protein subs, custom sushi rolls)
Smart call transfer to human staff with full context when needed
Analytics dashboard — call volumes, peak hours, popular orders
Over-the-phone credit card payment processing for delivery orders via POS integration
Built-in reservation system — AI confirms request, staff reviews on dashboard, confirmation text sent to customer
Menu scraped from online menu and mapped to POS item IDs during onboarding, including detailed dish descriptions (spiciness, sweetness, ingredients)

projects.name: Clone
projects.description: AI that runs your consulting business end to end. Automates invoicing, client onboarding, follow-ups, CRM updates, and reporting using the tools you already have. No new software to learn.
features: Invoicing and payment follow-up automation
Client onboarding checklists and welcome packets
Zoom call summaries pushed to CRM automatically
Automated follow-up emails based on conversation context
Weekly client dashboards and revenue reporting
Hours tracking and time logging exported to invoicing tools
Works with Gmail, Docs, Sheets, Zoom, HubSpot, Pipedrive, QuickBooks, Stripe, Calendly, Slack
Runs locally on your computer, client data never leaves your machine
projects.differentiator: Unlike Zapier or Make that require configuring triggers and branches, Clone takes plain English instructions and drives your existing tools. Unlike HoneyBook or Dubsado, it does not replace your stack. Unlike a virtual assistant at $3-6K/month, it runs 24/7 at $49/month.
projects.icp: Solo consultants and boutique advisory firms (1-10 people) spending 10+ hours per week on back-office tasks. Use Gmail, Google Workspace, Zoom, and a CRM. Want to free up billable hours without learning new software or hiring staff.

messaging.lead_with_pain: Solo consultants spend 10-15 hours a week on invoicing, CRM updates, follow-ups, and reporting. That is time you cannot bill for.
messaging.solution: Clone handles the back office end to end using the tools you already have open. Tell it what to do in plain English. No new software, no migration, no configuration.
messaging.proof: Consultants using Clone report saving 12+ hours per week on admin, doubling their client capacity without hiring.
messaging.cta: Free 14-day trial at cl0ne.ai, no credit card required.

voice.tone: Speak as a fellow consultant who automated their own practice. Focus on time saved and billable hours recaptured. Practical, specific, no buzzwords. Mention real tasks (invoicing after a call, CRM updates, Monday pipeline emails) not abstract benefits.

competitive_positioning.vs_zapier: Zapier requires manual trigger/action configuration. Clone understands natural language and drives your existing apps directly.
competitive_positioning.vs_honeybook: HoneyBook is a new tool to learn. Clone works with what you already have.
competitive_positioning.vs_virtual_assistant: A VA costs $3-6K/month for limited hours. Clone runs 24/7 at $49/month.
competitive_positioning.vs_make_n8n: Flow-based tools need technical setup. Clone takes plain English.

projects.name: mk0r
projects.description: AI app maker. Describe what you want, watch it build in real time, iterate with words. Generates full HTML/CSS/JS mobile apps from a single sentence. No code, no account, no friction.
projects.platform: Web (works on any device with a browser)
projects.setup: Just visit mk0r.com and start typing. No signup required.
features: Instant app generation from natural language descriptions
Real-time streaming preview as the app builds
Iterative refinement with follow-up prompts
Mobile-first design for every generated app
Working HTML/CSS/JS output, not mockups
No account or payment required to start
Powered by Claude AI
projects.differentiator: Zero-friction app building. No account, no setup, no code. Just describe and build. Unlike Emergent or similar tools that require signup and complex flows, mk0r is instant.
projects.icp: Non-technical founders, indie hackers, and anyone who wants to prototype an app idea quickly without writing code or learning a new tool.
